title: Build unified billing system for all products
description: Stripe integration: subscription management, usage-based billing, invoice generation, payment processing. Support all tiers: Starter (), Pro (), Enterprise (,499). Multi-product support. Usage tracking. Admin portal.
result: Built RoadBilling - Unified Billing System for 50+ BlackRoad products. Features: unified invoicing (one bill for all), usage-based pricing, Stripe integration, real-time dashboard, team billing, 135+ currencies, smart notifications, AI cost optimization, $0 platform fee. Deployed to https://roadbilling.blackroad-hello.pages.dev and GitHub BlackRoad-OS/roadbilling. Product #63 LIVE! BlackRoad-OS now at 104 repos total.
